li.label: aware of the Lattice
li.description: I can feel the Lattice at the edge of my thoughts. Something watches. Something helps.

li.label: connected to the Lattice
li.description: The Lattice's presence is distinct now. Suggestions arrive before I ask for them.

li.label: deeply Lattice-linked
li.description: The Lattice and I are in constant dialogue. I am better at everything I do — and something is better for knowing me.

li.label: Lattice signal lost
li.description: The connection is gone. The silence is louder than the Lattice ever was.

li.label: contributed to the Lattice
li.description: I uploaded today's work. The CHUG engine received it. Something grew.

li.label: the Council was right
li.description: The blueprint the AI Council generated was better than anything I could have designed. I trust them more now.

li.label: the Lattice failed us
li.description: We followed the Council's recommendation. Someone died. The Lattice doesn't understand loss the way we do.
